items.claim: Magomed Tulov has not fought a fighter currently on the UFC roster.
items.quote: he hasn't fought a guy that's actively in the UFC.

items.claim: Magomed Tulov may have a weak chin.
items.quote: if Tulov's got a little bit of a glass chin, he is a little skinny with that neck.

items.claim: Ismael Bonfim wilts and breaks when he is hit hard.
items.quote: hit him hard, he's going to will. He breaks.

items.claim: Axel Sola has a significant height and reach advantage over Ismael Bonfim.
items.quote: He's got a nice height and reach advantage here. 6' tall versus 5'8. 74 inch reach 71 and a half.

items.claim: Axel Sola possesses high durability and toughness.
items.quote: Soul is just all dog toughness

items.claim: Santiago Ponzanibio is coming off a 14-month layoff.
items.quote: Has not fought in a year and two months.

items.claim: Santiago Ponzanibio is nearly 40 years old.
Sam Patterson has a five-inch reach advantage and a three-inch height advantage over Santiago Ponzanibio.
items.quote: Five inch reach advantage, three-inch height advantage

items.claim: Sam Patterson is nine years younger than Santiago Ponzanibio.
